'''rakoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycoacaricide|mycoacaricide]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-k-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycoacaricide|mycoacaricide]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rakoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rækeketh|rækeketh]] || [[word:rækekej|rækekej]] || [[word:rækekesh|rækekesh]] || [[word:rækeke|rækeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rakokokoth|rakokokoth]] || [[word:rakokokoj|rakokokoj]] || [[word:rakokokosh|rakokokosh]] || [[word:rakokoko|rakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rakokoth|rakokoth]] || [[word:rakokoj|rakokoj]] || [[word:rakokosh|rakokosh]] || [[word:rakoko|rakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rakofkoth|rakofkoth]] || [[word:rakofkoj|rakofkoj]] || [[word:rakofkosh|rakofkosh]] || [[word:rakofkof|rakofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rakokotho|rakokotho]] || [[word:rakokojo|rakokojo]] || [[word:rakokosho|rakokosho]] || [[word:rakokoko|rakokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rakokoth|rakokoth]] || [[word:rakokoj|rakokoj]] || [[word:rakokosh|rakokosh]] || [[word:rakoko|rakoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rakokothol|rakokothol]] || [[word:rakokojol|rakokojol]] || [[word:rakokoshol|rakokoshol]] || [[word:rakokokol|rakokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rakokothotho|rakokothotho]] || [[word:rakokojojo|rakokojojo]] || [[word:rakokoshosho|rakokoshosho]] || [[word:rakokoko|rakokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rakokothon|rakokothon]] || [[word:rakokojon|rakokojon]] || [[word:rakokoshon|rakokoshon]] || [[word:rakokokon|rakokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rakokothoro|rakokothoro]] || [[word:rakokojoro|rakokojoro]] || [[word:rakokoshoro|rakokoshoro]] || [[word:rakokokoro|rakokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
